_notes: Append one entry per Claude/Codex session to sessions[].
Each session entry: { date, session_id, agent, model, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_usd, task_summary }.
Totals recomputed by IFleet cost tracker (PR #39) on every write.
Cost ceiling check: sum of today's sessions > daily_rate_cap_default = pause work + Discord alert.
